ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grantees" (
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grantee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the grantee organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the grantee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the grantee is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the grantee is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the grantee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the grantee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the grantee */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number for tax purposes */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the grantee's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "legal_structure" TEXT /* Legal structure of the organization */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the grantee organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the grant program */,
  "review_process" TEXT /* Review process for the grant program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the grant program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the grant program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of grant program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant program the grant is associated with */,
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grantee the grant is awarded to */,
  "award_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the grant award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "narrative" TEXT /* Narrative describing the grant project */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES grant_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_grantee_id FOREIGN KEY ("grantee_id") REFERENCES grantees ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant application */,
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grantee who submitted the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant program the application is for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project for which the grant is applied */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "budget_estimate" TEXT /* Estimated budget for the project */,
  "project_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES grant_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grantee_id FOREIGN KEY ("grantee_id") REFERENCES grantees ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "score" TEXT /* Numerical score given by the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES grant_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the reviewer is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant outcome */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was reported */,
  "outcome_report" TEXT /* Report detailing the grant outcomes */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the grant on the project or organization */,
  "financial_report" TEXT /* Financial report detailing the use of grant funds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_outcomes_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant payment */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_payments_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "financial_status" TEXT /* Financial status of the grant project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
